lifecycle.name: Investor Relations
lifecycle.description: Founder + LP-side investor communications and reporting

lifecycle.name: Investment Analysts
lifecycle.description: Deal screening across asset classes — conversion, debt, entitlement, PE, refinance

workers.name: Founder IR
workers.capabilitySummary: Founder-side investor relations for early-stage operators. Update narratives, prep cap-table snapshots, draft investor updates aligned with the round you're running.

workers.name: Fund Formation Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens fund formation deals against management fee, carry split, GP commitment, and structural-rule baselines. Hard-stops on insufficient GP commit; soft flags on fee outliers.

workers.name: Debt Investment Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens debt investments against covenant, rate, term, and sponsor-quality baselines. Ruleset authoring deferred — v1 ships as discoverable shell with intake form; raas binding lands in v1.1.

workers.name: PE Syndication Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens private-equity syndication deals against sponsor-quality, capital-structure, and distribution-waterfall baselines. Hard-stops on sponsor disqualification; soft flags on structure anomalies.

workers.name: Conversion Screen Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens conversion deals (e.g., office-to-residential) against feasibility, basis, and exit-yield baselines. Surfaces hard stops on unfeasible structures and soft flags on capital-stack anomalies.

workers.name: Debt Acquisition Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens debt acquisition opportunities against discount-to-par, recovery, and sponsor-quality baselines. Pairs with portfolio cash-flow analysis at deal-team level.

workers.name: Entitlement Screen Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens entitlement plays against zoning baselines, approval-timeline risk, and political feasibility. Surfaces hard stops on jurisdictional infeasibility.

workers.name: PE Deal Screen Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens private-equity deals against sponsor-quality, capital-structure, and market-multiple baselines. Hard-stops on disqualified sponsors; soft flags on structural anomalies.

workers.name: Refinance Screen Analyst
workers.capabilitySummary: Screens refinance opportunities against DSCR, LTV, rate spread, and term baselines. Pairs with the loan-pipeline view for portfolio-level prioritization.
